creator: freebsd-bug-report-yf@yf.bsdclub.org
text:
Created attachment 190654
patch to remove description about Japanese document for namazu2

I found file/pkg-message.in says document for namazu2 feature available on mailman-users-jp mailing list archive at mailman-jp, but sadly it is no longer available now.

P.S.
I'm very sorry for incomplete patch in my previous bug report.
